title: Sylvalis
description: A modpack aimed at improving the vanilla atmosphere of Minecraft. 1.21.1 Fabric
body:
This modpack is designed for those who appreciate the atmosphere of vanilla Minecraft, but want to improve it with a variety of structures, visual improvements, and convenient modifications. It does not have radical changes that add something alien to the game, but there is an emphasis on expanding existing capabilities and improving the quality of gameplay.

If you have any questions or suggestions for improving the modpack, you can write to me on Discord: justt3qq
